title: A Game About Leading A Crowds
description:
A Short , Simple and Satisfying Game About Leading Your Crowds to Defend the castle ,

Lead , Fight back , And Upgrades Yourself to become Overpower.

Lead your character across the battlefield, facing hordes of enemies seeking to conquer your castle.

1. Resources: Collect gold and silver coins from your enemies to purchase units and upgrade your character.

2. Organization: The key to success lies in how you organize your crowds and resources to maximize their effectiveness.

3. Accumulation: As you progress through the game, it becomes increasingly difficult, so beware as your enemies gain more damage and health.

4. Strategy: You must learn when, how, and who to use on the battlefield. Each unit has its own unique abilities. Do you prefer defensive or offensive formations? Attacking from a distance is another option; discover your own approach.

5. Juicy: Floating pop-up text, sound effects, and classic music all work together for a perfect gaming experience.

Thank you for your interest; we truly appreciate it. Please send us your feedback if you encounter any problems or have any suggestions :) .
description_short: A Short , Simple and Satisfying Incremental Game About Leading Your Crowds to Defend the castle. Lead , Fight back , And Upgrades Yourself to Overpower.
